summary: Updated ARCHITECTURE.md: fixed /api/health response spec to nested components format, aligned health.js API signatures with engine.design.md (startHealthCheck/stopHealthCheck/getAllHealth/onHealthChange), added Health response restructuring to M103 Phase 2 table, updated shutdown.js spec. Updated codebase-map.md: added planned M103 files (health.js, queue.js, shutdown.js), fixed stale graceful-shutdown note, added /api/health nesting to open issues.
